d:
Passive. Viperian burns HP as much as possible when a battle starts, sending Darkvipers to possess all enemies until his HP is below [[60%]]. During this skill, he is [[unaffected|uncontrol]] while losing [[7%]] max HP for each Darkviper deployed. Every possessed enemy drops [[20]] Energy on Hit, losing [[1%]]<HP> HP per second to sustain the survivability of the Darkviper on them. Viperian calls a Darkviper back to recover [[14%]]<HP> HP when his HP ratio is below [[30%]].
Active. Viperian deals [[280%]]<ATK> damage to all possessed enemies. He inflicts the nearest enemy with the same effect and Darkviper possession if no enemy on the battlefield is possessed.
Viperian drains HP from the [[healthiest|strongest]] enemy, dealing [[210%]]<ATK> damage and recovering HP that equals the damage dealt.

Passive. Darkvipers launch Tearing Bite once every [[3]]s during the battle, dealing [[65%]]<ATK> damage once to all the possessed enemies. 
Active. Viperian burns [[10%]] max HP to enhance the next Tearing Bite, dealing [[140%]]<ATK> damage to the target and reducing their Energy by [[60]].
Increases Common Tearing Bite damage to [[75%]]<ATK>.
Increases Enhanced Tearing Bite damage to [[150%]]<ATK>.

Viperian burns [[30%]]<HP> HP [[10]]s into a battle if his HP ratio is above [[90%]], dealing [[420%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies. He is [[unaffected|uncontrol]] during the skill casting. This skill can be triggered once every [[30]]s.
Darkvipers gain [[2]] enhancements after the skill is cast.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, casting an Ultimate increases damage dealt by [[8%]] for the next [[8]]s. Unstackable. The first Ultimate cast also permanently increases Energy recovery from attacking by [[8%]].
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 12 Crit, 10 Haste, 12 Execution.

d: Darkvipers return when the possessed enemies are defeated, recovering [[14%]]<HP> HP and [[80]] Energy for Viperian.
